query:
INSERT INTO devices
                (user_id, access_token, id, name, app_name, app_version)
            VALUES
                (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)
            ON CONFLICT(id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET
                name = excluded.name,
                access_token = excluded.access_token,
                app_name    = excluded.app_name,
                app_version = excluded.app_version
